title: Summer Hotbar
description: A summer resource Pack that changes hotbar, hunger and armor icons, adding to the beach atmosphere
body:
Changes the armor icons, turning them into a beach shirt, the hunger icons are coconut/uncovered coconut, and also changes the color of your level scale from emerald green to azure. 

The inventory cells have also been changed from boring gray to sandy and sunny, behind them you can see the warm ocean with small islands and palm trees, the invetor icon you have selected will be highlighted with palm leaves


If you're playing at different version than 1.20 Minecraft then the game may issue a warning that can be successfully skipped
